links.title: openai/privacy-filter

primary_link.title: openai/privacy-filter

openai.summary: OpenAI Privacy Filter is a bidirectional token-classification model for personally identifiable information (PII) detection and masking in text. It is intended for high-throughput data sanitization workflows where teams need a model that they can run on-premises that is fast, context-aware, and tunable. OpenAI Privacy Filter is pretrained autoregressively to arrive at a checkpoint with similar architecture to gpt-oss, albeit of a smaller size. We then converted that checkpoint into a bidirectional token classifier over a privacy label taxonomy, and post-trained with a supervised classification loss. links.title: microsoft/skala-1.1

primary_link.title: microsoft/skala-1.1

other.summary: In pursuit of the universal functional for density functional theory (DFT), the OneDFT team from Microsoft Research AI for Science has developed the Skala-1.1 exchange-correlation functional, as introduced in Accurate and scalable exchange-correlation with deep learning, Luise et al. 2025. This approach departs from the traditional route of incorporating increasingly expensive hand-designed non-local features from Jacob\'s ladder into functional forms to improve their accuracy. Instead, we employ a deep learning approach with a scalable neural network that uses only inexpensive input features to learn the necessary non-local representations.
other.title: microsoft/skala-1.1

links.title: Where Reasoning Breaks: Logic-Aware Path Selection by Controlling Logical Connectives in LLMs Reasoning Chains

primary_link.title: Where Reasoning Breaks: Logic-Aware Path Selection by Controlling Logical Connectives in LLMs Reasoning Chains

papers.summary: While LLMs demonstrate impressive reasoning capabilities, they remain fragile in multi-step logical deduction, where a single transition error can propagate through the entire reasoning chain, leading to unstable performance. In this work, we identify logical connectives as primary points of this structural fragility. Through empirical analysis, we show that connective tokens function as high entropy forking points, at which models frequently struggle to determine the correct logical direction.
papers.summary_zh: 雖然 LLMs 展示了令人印象深刻的推理能力，但它們在多步驟邏輯推導中仍然脆弱，其中單一的轉換錯誤會透過整個推理鏈傳播，導致性能不穩定。在這項工作中，我們將 logical connectives 識別為這種結構性脆弱性的主要點。透過實證分析，我們表明 connective tokens 作為高熵的分叉點，在這些點上 models 經常難以確定正確的邏輯方向。
papers.title: Where Reasoning Breaks: Logic-Aware Path Selection by Controlling Logical Connectives in LLMs Reasoning Chains

papers.summary_zh: 我們介紹了 V-tableR1，一個過程監督式的強化學習框架，它能從多模態大型語言模型 (MLLMs) 中引導出嚴謹、可驗證的推理。目前僅依賴最終結果進行訓練的 MLLMs 常常將視覺推理視為黑箱，依賴膚淺的模式匹配而非執行嚴謹的多步驟推斷。雖然 Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards 可以強制執行透明的推理軌跡，但將其擴展到視覺領域仍然存在挑戰...

papers.summary_zh: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) 透過利用直接結果驗證而非學習到的獎勵模型，提升了大型語言模型 (LLMs) 的推理能力。基於此範式，Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) 消除了對評論家模型的需求，但存在中間步驟不加區分的信用分配問題，這限制了其識別有效推理策略的能力並導致過度思考。在這項工作中，我們引入了...

papers.summary: Spatial intelligence is essential for multimodal large language models, yet current benchmarks largely assess it only from an understanding perspective. papers.summary_zh: 空間智慧對於 multimodal large language models 至關重要，然而目前的基準測試主要僅從理解的角度來評估它。我們探討現代生成式或統一多模態模型是否也具備生成式空間智慧 (GSI)，即在圖像生成過程中遵循和操縱 3D 空間限制的能力，以及這種能力是否可以被測量或改進。我們引入了 GSI-Bench，這是第一個旨在透過空間感知來量化 GSI 的基準測試。

links.title: Video-ToC: Video Tree-of-Cue Reasoning

primary_link.title: Video-ToC: Video Tree-of-Cue Reasoning

papers.summary: Existing Video Large Language Models (Video LLMs) struggle with complex video understanding, exhibiting limited reasoning capabilities and potential hallucinations. papers.summary_zh: 雖然 Large Language Models (LLMs) 在函數級別的程式碼生成方面表現出色，但像生成功能性且視覺美觀的多頁網站等專案級任務仍然極具挑戰性。現有工作通常僅限於單頁靜態網站，而 agentic 框架通常依賴於使用專有模型的 multi-turn 執行，這會導致大量的 token 成本、高延遲和脆弱的整合。使用 Reinforcement Learning (RL) 端到端訓練一個小型 LLM 是一個有潛力的方法。

papers.summary_zh: Knowledge distillation (KD) 是一種用於壓縮 Large Language Models (LLMs) 的強大範式，其有效性取決於散度方向、優化策略和數據體系的交織選擇。我們分解了現有 KD 方法的設計，並提出了一個統一的視角，建立了它們之間的聯繫，將 KD 重新 форму化為 token 級別的 reweighted log-likelihood 目標。我們進一步提出了 Hybrid Policy Distillation (HPD)，它整合了互補的優勢。

papers.summary_zh: AI coding agents 正在大規模被採用，但我們缺乏關於人們如何實際使用它們以及它們的輸出在實踐中有多少用處的實證證據。我們介紹了 SWE-chat，這是第一個大規模的真實 coding agent 會話資料集，從野外的開源開發者那裡收集而來。該資料集目前包含 6,000 個會話，由超過 63,000 個用戶 prompts 和 355,000 個 agent tool calls 組成。SWE-chat 是一個不斷成長的資料集；我們的收集管道會自動且持續地發現新的會話。

links.title: Interval POMDP Shielding for Imperfect-Perception Agents

primary_link.title: Interval POMDP Shielding for Imperfect-Perception Agents

papers.summary: Autonomous systems that rely on learned perception can make unsafe decisions when sensor readings are misclassified. We study shielding for this setting: given a proposed action, a shield blocks actions that could violate safety. We consider the common case where system dynamics are known but perception uncertainty must be estimated from finite labeled data. papers.summary_zh: 依賴學習感知能力的自主系統，當感測器讀數被錯誤分類時，可能會做出不安全的決策。我們研究了這種情況下的 shielding：給定一個提議的動作，一個 shield 會阻擋可能違反安全的動作。我們考慮常見的情況，即系統動力學是已知的，但 perception uncertainty 必須從有限的標註數據中估計。從這些數據中，我們為 perception outcomes 的機率建立 confidence intervals，並使用它們將系統建模為有限的 Interval Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (I-POMDP)。

primary_link.title: The Expense of Seeing: Attaining Trustworthy Multimodal Reasoning Within the Monolithic Paradigm

papers.summary: The rapid proliferation of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is widely celebrated as the dawn of unified multimodal knowledge discovery but its foundation operates on a dangerous, unquestioned axiom: that current VLMs faithfully synthesise multimodal data. We argue they do not. Instead, a profound crisis of trustworthiness underlies the dominant Vision Encoder-Projector-LLM paradigm. links.title: Measuring the Machine: Evaluating Generative AI as Pluralist Sociotechical Systems

primary_link.title: Measuring the Machine: Evaluating Generative AI as Pluralist Sociotechical Systems

radar.summary: In measurement theory, instruments do not simply record reality; they help constitute what is observed. The same holds for generative AI evaluation: benchmarks do not just measure, they shape what models appear to be. Functionalist benchmarks treat models as isolated predictors, while prescriptive approaches assess what systems ought to be. Both obscure the sociotechnical processes through which meaning and values are enacted, risking the reification of narrow cultural perspectives in pluralist
radar.summary_zh: 在測量理論中，儀器不僅僅記錄現實；它們有助於構成被觀察到的事物。這同樣適用於 generative AI 評估：benchmarks 不僅僅是測量，它們還塑造了模型的樣貌。功能主義的 benchmarks 將模型視為孤立的 predictors，而規範性方法則評估系統應該是什麼樣的。兩者都模糊了意義和價值觀被實現的 sociotechnical processes，冒著在多元社會中將狹隘文化觀點具體化的風險

radar.summary_zh: 人工智慧 (AI) 的價值對齊問題通常被視為一個純粹的技術或規範性挑戰，有時側重於假設的未來系統。我認為這個問題最好被理解為一個關於治理的結構性問題：不是 AI 系統在抽象層面是否對齊，而是它對誰對齊足夠，以及以什麼代價。借鑒經濟學中的 principal-agent framework (委託代理框架)，本文將未對齊 (misalignment) 重新概念化為沿著三個方面產生
